mapper.select: SELECT REPORT_NO, REPORT_REASON, REPORT_DETAIL, REPORT_DATE, REPORT_STATUS, REPORTER_NO, REPORTED_NO, REVIEW_NO FROM REPORT WHERE REPORT_STATUS = 'PENDING'
SELECT REVIEW_NO, MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, STAGE_NO, REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_WRITE_DATE, REVIEW_UPDATE_DATE FROM REVIEWS JOIN MEMBER USING (MEMBER_NO) WHERE REVIEW_DEL_FL = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_GOODS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO GOODS ( GOODS_NO, GOODS_NAME, GOODS_SORT, GOODS_CATEGORY, GOODS_PRICE, DELIVERY_COST, GOODS_SELLER, GOODS_INFO, GOODS_REG_DATE, GOODS_DEL_FL ) VALUES ( #{goodsNo}, #{goodsName}, #{goodsSort}, #{goodsCategory}, #{goodsPrice}, #{deliveryCost}, #{goodsSeller}, #{goodsInfo}, SYSDATE, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT G.GOODS_NO, G.GOODS_NAME, G.GOODS_SORT, G.GOODS_CATEGORY, G.GOODS_PRICE, G.DELIVERY_COST, G.GOODS_SELLER, G.GOODS_THUMBNAIL, TO_CHAR(G.GOODS_REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS GOODS_REG_DATE, G.GOODS_DEL_FL FROM GOODS G ORDER BY G.GOODS_NO DESC
